name: Allstacks
description: Value-stream intelligence platform measuring engineering risk, productivity and AI coding impact using DORA, SPACE and flow frameworks.

seo.title: Allstacks — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Allstacks: Value-stream intelligence platform measuring engineering risk, productivity and AI coding impact using DORA, SPACE and flow frameworks.

when_to_use: Track DORA metrics across engineering teams
Forecast delivery risk with value-stream intelligence
Measure AI coding tool impact on developer productivity
Identify bottlenecks in software delivery flow
SPACE framework dashboards for team health reviews

pros: DORA, SPACE and flow metrics in one dashboard
AI coding impact tracking for Copilot/Cursor ROI
Risk prediction across active engineering work
Pulls from Git, Jira, and CI without manual setup
cons: Metrics can feel like surveillance to IC engineers
Forecasts only as good as clean ticket hygiene
Insights overlap heavily with LinearB and Jellyfish
review.verdict: Solid value-stream analytics for VP Eng buyers, but risks misuse as productivity policing tool.
review.best_for: Engineering leaders measuring AI tool ROI and flow health across 100+ devs.
review.not_for: Small teams or cultures that reject top-down productivity metrics.

lock_in.reason: Engineering intelligence tied to Allstacks data model
